subcodes.first_line: O loved ones of ‘Abdu'l-Baha! Whatever meeting is held to celebrate the memory of the Abha Beauty and to listen to the recital of the divine utterances
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء هر محفلی که بیاد جمال ابهی تزیین یابد و بجهت استماع کلمات
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
